chunks.title: Israelites in Egypt
chunks.reason: Lists the sons of Jacob and notes their growth in number.

chunks.title: Oppression by Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Describes the new king's rise and the harsh labor imposed on Israel.

chunks.title: The Hebrew Midwives
chunks.reason: Records the interaction between Pharaoh and the midwives regarding the newborn boys.

chunks.title: Pharaoh's Decree
chunks.reason: States the final command to cast all Hebrew sons into the Nile.

chunks.title: Birth and Naming of Moses
chunks.reason: Describes the birth of Moses, his hiding in the ark, discovery by Pharaoh's daughter, and return to his mother.

chunks.title: Moses Flees Egypt
chunks.reason: Narrates Moses killing an Egyptian, his confrontation with a Hebrew, and his flight to Midian.

chunks.title: Moses in Midian
chunks.reason: Details Moses helping the daughters of Jethro, settling in Midian, and marrying Zipporah.

chunks.title: God Hears Israel's Cry
chunks.reason: Describes the death of the Egyptian king, the Israelites' groaning in slavery, and God remembering His covenant.

chunks.title: The Burning Bush
chunks.reason: Describes the initial appearance of God in the bush and Moses' reaction to the holy ground.

chunks.title: God's Call and Commission
chunks.reason: Contains God declaring His purpose for Israel and Moses questioning his suitability.

chunks.title: The Divine Name and Instructions
chunks.reason: Covers the revelation of God's name and detailed instructions for Moses to deliver to the elders and Pharaoh.

chunks.title: The Three Signs
chunks.reason: Moses questions his authority and Yahweh provides three miraculous signs to validate his mission.

chunks.title: Moses' Objections and Aaron's Appointment
chunks.reason: Moses hesitates due to his speech impediment, leading Yahweh to appoint Aaron as his spokesman.

chunks.title: Departure for Egypt
chunks.reason: Moses returns to Jethro, receives permission, and travels back to Egypt with his family.

chunks.title: Instructions for Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses on the message to deliver and warns of the hardening of Pharaoh's heart.

chunks.title: The Encounter at the Lodging Place
chunks.reason: A dramatic incident where Yahweh seeks to kill Moses and Zipporah performs circumcision.

chunks.title: Meeting Aaron and the People
chunks.reason: Aaron meets Moses, they gather the elders, perform signs, and the people believe.

chunks.title: Moses and Aaron Confront Pharaoh
chunks.reason: The initial request for release and Pharaoh's skeptical response.

chunks.title: Pharaoh Increases the Burden
chunks.reason: The decree to remove straw and the taskmasters enforcing the quota.

chunks.title: Foremen Complain to Pharaoh and Moses
chunks.reason: The foremen's appeal to Pharaoh followed by their confrontation with Moses.

chunks.title: Moses' Complaint to Yahweh
chunks.reason: Moses questioning God regarding the increased hardship on the people.

chunks.title: God's Promise to Moses and Israel
chunks.reason: A cohesive speech where God reaffirms the covenant and promises deliverance, followed by the people's initial reaction.

chunks.title: Moses' Objection and God's Command
chunks.reason: A dialogue sequence where Moses questions his ability to speak to Pharaoh and God issues a direct command to him and Aaron.

chunks.title: Genealogy of the Patriarchs and Levites
chunks.reason: A detailed list of family lines for Reuben, Simeon, and Levi, including specific names and lifespans.

chunks.title: Moses and Aaron Commissioned Again
chunks.reason: A narrative conclusion identifying Moses and Aaron as the chosen leaders and recording a final exchange regarding their speech.

chunks.title: Moses and Aaron Commissioned
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses and Aaron on their roles before Pharaoh.

chunks.title: The Staff Becomes a Serpent
chunks.reason: Narrative of the first miracle and Pharaoh's reaction.

chunks.title: The Plague of Blood
chunks.reason: Narrative of the second sign and the resulting plague.

chunks.title: The Plague of Frogs
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering the command, execution, negotiation, and removal of the first plague.

chunks.title: The Plague of Gnats
chunks.reason: A distinct narrative unit describing the second plague and the magicians' recognition of God's power.

chunks.title: The Plague of Flies
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit detailing the third plague, the distinction made for Goshen, and Pharaoh's final refusal.

chunks.title: The Plague on Livestock
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the warning, execution, and result of the first plague.

chunks.title: The Plague of Boils
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the preparation, execution, and result of the second plague.

chunks.title: Warning of Hail
chunks.reason: Oracle containing Yahweh's warning and the distinction made by Pharaoh's servants.

chunks.title: The Plague of Hail
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the execution of the hail, the partial relief, and Pharaoh's final hardening.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Instruction and Moses' Warning
chunks.reason: Moses delivers a unified warning to Pharaoh about the coming locust plague.

chunks.title: Negotiation with Pharaoh
chunks.reason: A back-and-forth exchange between Pharaoh's servants, Pharaoh, and Moses regarding who will go.

chunks.title: The Plague of Locusts
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the locusts arriving, consuming the land, and Pharaoh's temporary plea.

chunks.title: The Plague of Darkness
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the three days of darkness and the distinction for Israel.

chunks.title: Final Negotiation and Departure
chunks.reason: The final negotiation over livestock and Moses' declaration to leave Pharaoh.

chunks.title: Instruction to Moses
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses about the final plague and the request for silver and gold.

chunks.title: Moses' Prophecy to Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Moses delivers Yahweh's oracle regarding the death of the firstborn and the departure of Israel.

chunks.title: Hardening of Pharaoh's Heart
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing Moses' actions and the hardening of Pharaoh's heart.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Passover and Unleavened Bread
chunks.reason: Contains Yahweh's direct commands to Moses and Aaron regarding the timing, selection, preparation, and consumption of the Passover lamb and the Feast of Unleavened Bread.

chunks.title: Moses Instructs the Elders and Execution
chunks.reason: Describes Moses relaying the instructions to the elders, the people's obedience in preparing the lamb, and the execution of the plague.

chunks.title: The Plague and Pharaoh's Decree
chunks.reason: Narrates the striking of the firstborn at midnight, Pharaoh's reaction, his command for Israel to leave, and the Egyptians pressing them out.

chunks.title: The Departure from Egypt
chunks.reason: Details the journey from Rameses to Succoth, the departure with livestock and a mixed multitude, and the historical note on the 430-year sojourn.

chunks.title: Statutes for the Passover Celebration
chunks.reason: Concludes with further regulations regarding who may eat the Passover, specific rules for foreigners and slaves, and a final summary of the people's obedience.

chunks.title: Law on Firstborns and Unleavened Bread
chunks.reason: A continuous legal instruction regarding the consecration of firstborns and the observance of the Feast of Unleavened Bread.

chunks.title: The Journey to the Red Sea
chunks.reason: A narrative account of God guiding Israel out of Egypt through the wilderness.

chunks.title: Divine Instruction to Moses
chunks.reason: Yahweh gives specific marching orders and reveals His purpose for hardening Pharaoh's heart.

chunks.title: Pharaoh's Pursuit and Israel's Fear
chunks.reason: Narrative of Pharaoh changing his mind, chasing the people, and the Israelites' complaint to Moses.

chunks.title: Moses Encourages the People
chunks.reason: Moses delivers a direct exhortation to stand firm and witness Yahweh's salvation.

chunks.title: Divine Command and Cloud Movement
chunks.reason: Yahweh instructs Moses to split the sea while the angel and cloud pillar shift positions.

chunks.title: Crossing the Sea and Egyptian Confusion
chunks.reason: The sea parts for Israel while Yahweh confuses the Egyptian army during the night watch.

chunks.title: Destruction of the Army and Victory
chunks.reason: The waters return to destroy the Egyptians as Israel witnesses Yahweh's great hand.

chunks.title: Song of Moses and Miriam
chunks.reason: A unified poetic song celebrating the deliverance at the Red Sea, including the refrain by Miriam.

chunks.title: Journey to Marah and Elim
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative account of the Israelites traveling through the wilderness, finding bitter water, and arriving at a place of rest.

chunks.title: Arrival and Complaint
chunks.reason: Describes the arrival at Sinai and the people's grumbling about hunger.

chunks.title: Promise of Provision
chunks.reason: Moses and Aaron speak to the people followed by Yahweh's direct instruction.

chunks.title: The Manna Appears
chunks.reason: Narrative of the quails arriving and the first gathering of manna.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Sabbath
chunks.reason: Details regarding the double portion on the sixth day and the rest on the seventh.

chunks.title: Naming and Preservation
chunks.reason: Describes the appearance of manna, its storage in a jar, and duration of consumption.

chunks.title: Water from the Rock at Rephidim
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit describing the people's thirst, Moses' intercession, and God providing water from the rock.

chunks.title: Victory over Amalek
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative covering the battle with Amalek, Moses' raised hands supported by Aaron and Hur, and the subsequent altar dedication.

chunks.title: Jethro Visits Moses
chunks.reason: Describes Jethro's arrival, the reunion with Moses, and the sacrificial meal.

chunks.title: Jethro's Counsel on Leadership
chunks.reason: Contains dialogue where Jethro advises Moses and the subsequent implementation of the judicial system.

chunks.title: Arrival at Sinai
chunks.reason: Describes the Israelites' journey and encampment before the mountain.

chunks.title: Covenant Proposal and Acceptance
chunks.reason: Contains God's offer of covenant status and the people's verbal agreement.

chunks.title: Preparation Instructions
chunks.reason: Details the specific commands for purification and boundaries before the event.

chunks.title: Theophany on Sinai
chunks.reason: Narrates the dramatic arrival of God with sensory details and Moses ascending.

chunks.title: Warning to the People
chunks.reason: Records the exchange regarding the boundaries between God, Moses, and the people.

chunks.title: The Ten Commandments
chunks.reason: Contains the direct speech of God delivering the core moral laws to Israel.

chunks.title: The People's Reaction
chunks.reason: Describes the physical reaction of the people to the theophany and their dialogue with Moses.

chunks.title: Instructions on Altars
chunks.reason: God gives specific instructions to Moses regarding the construction and use of altars.

chunks.title: Laws on Hebrew Slaves
chunks.reason: Covers regulations for male and female Hebrew servants.

chunks.title: Laws on Personal Injury
chunks.reason: Details penalties for death, injury, and cursing parents.

chunks.title: Laws on Contention and Servants
chunks.reason: Addresses disputes, pregnancy injuries, and slave treatment.

chunks.title: Laws on Oxen and Pits
chunks.reason: Outlines liability for goring oxen and uncovered pits.

chunks.title: Laws on Property and Restitution
chunks.reason: A continuous section detailing specific legal penalties for theft, grazing damage, fire, bailment, and borrowing.

chunks.title: Laws on Social Relations and Worship
chunks.reason: A distinct group of laws covering seduction, sorcery, animal sacrifice, and idolatry.

chunks.title: Care for the Vulnerable and Poor
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit focusing on social justice regarding sojourners, widows, orphans, and financial loans.

chunks.title: Laws on Worship and Holiness
chunks.reason: The final section combines commands regarding God's name, harvest offerings, firstborns, and dietary purity.

chunks.title: Judicial and Social Laws
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit of legal instructions regarding witnesses, justice, and treatment of others.

chunks.title: Sabbatical Year and Rest
chunks.reason: Instructions on agricultural cycles and the weekly Sabbath rest.

chunks.title: Feast Regulations
chunks.reason: Detailed commands concerning the three annual feasts and sacrificial offerings.

chunks.title: Promise of Conquest
chunks.reason: A divine oracle promising guidance, victory over enemies, and the boundaries of the land.

chunks.title: The Covenant Ratification Ceremony
chunks.reason: Describes the complete ritual of blood sprinkling and verbal agreement establishing the covenant.

chunks.title: The Elders See God
chunks.reason: Records the specific vision of the nobles seeing God and eating in His presence.

chunks.title: Moses Called to the Mountain
chunks.reason: Contains Yahweh's command and Moses' instructions to the elders before ascending.

chunks.title: Moses Enters the Cloud
chunks.reason: Narrates the cloud covering the mountain and Moses entering for forty days.

chunks.title: Call for Contributions and Purpose
chunks.reason: Introduction to the tabernacle project with a list of materials.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Ark and Mercy Seat
chunks.reason: Detailed specifications for the ark, mercy seat, and cherubim.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Table of Showbread
chunks.reason: Detailed specifications for the table and its utensils.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Lampstand
chunks.reason: Detailed specifications for the lampstand and final reminder of the pattern.

chunks.title: Inner Curtains of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Detailed instructions for constructing the ten linen curtains with cherubim and their joining mechanism.

chunks.title: Outer Coverings of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Instructions for the goat hair tent and the protective coverings of ram and porpoise skins.

chunks.title: Boards and Bars of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Specifications for the acacia wood boards, silver bases, and gold overlay bars forming the structure.

chunks.title: The Veil and Interior Arrangement
chunks.reason: Directions for the separating veil, pillars, ark placement, and positioning of the table and lampstand.

chunks.title: Screen for the Tent Doorway
chunks.reason: Final instructions for the woven screen and its five pillars at the entrance.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Bronze Altar
chunks.reason: Detailed specifications for constructing the altar of burnt offering.

chunks.title: Dimensions and Materials for the Court
chunks.reason: Measurements and construction details for the tabernacle courtyard.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Lamp Stand
chunks.reason: Command to provide oil for the lamp and its perpetual maintenance.

chunks.title: Call to Consecrate Priests and Garments
chunks.reason: God commands Moses to bring Aaron and his sons and instructs the making of holy garments using specific materials.

chunks.title: Construction of the Ephod
chunks.reason: Detailed instructions for crafting the ephod, including shoulder stones with engraved names of Israel's sons.

chunks.title: Construction of the Breastpiece of Judgment
chunks.reason: Specifications for the breastpiece with twelve stones representing tribes, including Urim and Thummim.

chunks.title: The Robe of the Ephod
chunks.reason: Description of the blue robe with pomegranates and bells to ensure the priest's life while ministering.

chunks.title: The Gold Plate of the Turban
chunks.reason: Instructions for the gold plate engraved with 'Holy to Yahweh' to bear the iniquity of holy gifts.

chunks.title: Garments for Aaron's Sons and Final Consecration
chunks.reason: Commands to make tunics, sashes, and caps for the sons, undergarments, and the final ordination ritual.

chunks.title: Preparation for Ordination
chunks.reason: Instructions for gathering offerings and dressing the priests.

chunks.title: The Bull Sin Offering
chunks.reason: Ritual details for the first sacrifice and disposal of remains.

chunks.title: The Burnt Offering Ram
chunks.reason: Instructions for the second ram offered as a whole burnt offering.

chunks.title: The Ordination Ram Ritual
chunks.reason: Detailed steps for the third ram including blood application and wave offering.

chunks.title: Priestly Portions and Garments
chunks.reason: Designation of the breast and thigh for priests and rules for priestly vestments.

chunks.title: The Ordination Meal
chunks.reason: Instructions on eating the sacrificial meat and bread within the holy place.

chunks.title: Seven Days of Consecration
chunks.reason: Summary of the seven-day purification process for the altar and priests.

chunks.title: The Daily Sacrifice
chunks.reason: Establishment of the continual morning and evening burnt offerings.

chunks.title: Divine Promise of Presence
chunks.reason: God's promise to meet with Israel and dwell among them.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Incense Altar
chunks.reason: Describes the construction and usage of the altar for burning incense.

chunks.title: The Census Atonement Money
chunks.reason: Details the half-shekel tax for the census to serve as atonement.

chunks.title: The Bronze Laver
chunks.reason: Commands the making of a laver for priestly washing before service.

chunks.title: The Holy Anointing Oil
chunks.reason: Lists ingredients and regulations for the sacred anointing oil.

chunks.title: The Holy Incense
chunks.reason: Describes the composition and usage of the sacred incense.

chunks.title: Appointment of Bezalel and Oholiab
chunks.reason: Yahweh speaks to Moses appointing artisans for the tabernacle.

chunks.title: Command to Keep the Sabbath
chunks.reason: Yahweh commands Israel to observe the Sabbath as a covenant sign.

chunks.title: Giving of the Tablets
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing Moses receiving the stone tablets.

chunks.title: The Golden Calf
chunks.reason: Narrative of the people's idolatry and Aaron's role in making the calf.

chunks.title: God's Anger and Moses' Intercession
chunks.reason: Divine declaration of judgment followed by Moses' persuasive prayer.

chunks.title: Moses Descends and Breaks the Tablets
chunks.reason: Physical descent, Joshua's report, and Moses' destruction of the idol.

chunks.title: Confrontation with Aaron and Levite Judgment
chunks.reason: Moses questions Aaron, followed by the call to arms and execution of judgment.

chunks.title: Moses' Second Intercession and Final Verdict
chunks.reason: Moses offers to be blotted out for the people and receives God's final instruction.

chunks.title: The Tent Outside the Camp
chunks.reason: Narrative of God's command to move and Israel's mourning response.

chunks.title: The Tent of Meeting
chunks.reason: Description of the tent's location and the cloud pillar appearing there.

chunks.title: Moses Intercedes for Presence
chunks.reason: Dialogue between Moses and Yahweh regarding the promise of His presence.

chunks.title: Moses Sees God's Back
chunks.reason: Moses' request to see glory and the resulting divine revelation.

chunks.title: Moses prepares the tablets
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Moses carving new stone tablets and ascending Mount Sinai.

chunks.title: God reveals His name and Moses worships
chunks.reason: Divine self-revelation followed by Moses' prayerful response.

chunks.title: The Covenant Code
chunks.reason: Divine instructions regarding the covenant, conquest of Canaan, and religious festivals.

chunks.title: Writing the covenant
chunks.reason: Narrative transition where Moses writes the words and fasts for forty days.

chunks.title: Moses' radiant face
chunks.reason: Description of Moses' shining countenance and the use of the veil.

chunks.title: Sabbath Command
chunks.reason: Moses establishes the Sabbath law with specific penalties and prohibitions.

chunks.title: Call for Contributions
chunks.reason: Moses calls for materials and the people respond with generous offerings.

chunks.title: Appointment of Bezalel and Oholiab
chunks.reason: Moses announces the divine selection and gifting of specific craftsmen.

chunks.title: Moses and the Builders
chunks.reason: Narrative describing the selection of workers and the surplus of materials.

chunks.title: Construction of Curtains
chunks.reason: Detailed technical specifications for the tabernacle coverings.

chunks.title: Construction of Boards and Bars
chunks.reason: Detailed technical specifications for the tabernacle structure.

chunks.title: Veil and Doorway Screen
chunks.reason: Detailed technical specifications for the entrance furnishings.

chunks.title: Construction of the Ark and Mercy Seat
chunks.reason: Describes the making of the ark and mercy seat as a continuous narrative unit.

chunks.title: Construction of the Table and Utensils
chunks.reason: Details the creation of the table for showbread and its associated vessels.

chunks.title: Construction of the Lampstand
chunks.reason: Narrates the crafting of the golden lampstand and its components.

chunks.title: Construction of the Incense Altar
chunks.reason: Records the building of the altar of incense and its carrying poles.

chunks.title: Preparation of Oil and Incense
chunks.reason: Lists the final items prepared by Bezalel for the tabernacle service.

chunks.title: Construction of the Altar and Laver
chunks.reason: Describes the physical construction and materials of the bronze altar and the laver.

chunks.title: Dimensions and Materials of the Court
chunks.reason: Provides a detailed inventory of the court's hangings, pillars, bases, and gate screen.

chunks.title: Inventory Summary and Craftsmen
chunks.reason: Lists the total materials used, names the chief craftsmen, and summarizes the allocation of resources.

chunks.title: Making the Ephod and Shoulder Stones
chunks.reason: Describes the creation of the ephod and the placement of the onyx stones.

chunks.title: Making the Breastpiece
chunks.reason: Details the construction of the breastpiece, its stones, chains, and attachment to the ephod.

chunks.title: Making the Robe and Priestly Headgear
chunks.reason: Covers the robe with pomegranates and bells, tunics, and the golden plate for the turban.

chunks.title: Inventory of Tabernacle Furnishings
chunks.reason: Lists all the completed items brought to Moses including the tent, ark, altar, and garments.

chunks.title: Completion and Blessing
chunks.reason: Summarizes the completion of the work according to command and Moses' blessing.

chunks.title: Instructions for Tabernacle and Priests
chunks.reason: Divine commands detailing the setup of the tabernacle and consecration of Aaron and his sons.

chunks.title: Erection of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Moses executing the divine instructions to build and furnish the sanctuary.

chunks.title: Divine Presence and Guidance
chunks.reason: Description of the cloud covering the tabernacle and the guidance it provided for Israel's journeys.
